hooks.command: TODAY=$(date "+%A, %B %d, %Y"); ISO=$(date "+%Y-%m-%d"); printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"SESSION-START BRIEFING (deliver before responding to anything else; begin the reply with the word Samarth per CLAUDE.md): (1) Tell Samarth today is %s. (2) Lead with the PROGRESS scoreboard table from @plans/PLAN.md — streak, gates, last blind set, next checkpoint. (3) Read @notes/REVIEW.md and list every row whose Review Date is a real date on or before %s as DUE THIS SESSION (problem name, tag, days overdue); rows whose Review Date starts with SUSP are class-A-suspended — give ONE summary line, never list them as due. If none are due, say reviews are clear. (4) From the CURRENT POSITION block in @plans/PLAN.md surface today items and the next new-slot problem, and state the class-A due count vs the WIP lock. Keep it a tight briefing, then wait."}}' "$TODAY" "$ISO"
